case_title: DENNIS ISHAM VS. LI INVESTMENT GROUP, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ISHAM, DENNIS AS TO DEFENDANT LI INVESTMENT GROUP, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA SMA AIRPORT PARKING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ISHAM, DENNIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LI INVESTMENT GROUP, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA SMA AIRPORT PARKING $6,413.00 PRINCIPAL, $124.64 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,742.64, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
